sections.paragraph:
ἔκρυσις, εως, ἡ (ἐκ + ῥέω; Hippocr., Aristot. et al.; IG XI/2, 144 A, 73 [ἐγρ-], IV/III b.c.; Ezk 40:38) someth. given off as in a stream, outflow, efflux, in description of the miserable death of Judas Papias (3:3).—JKürzinger, Papias v. Hierap. u. d. Evgg. des NT, 1883, p. 104f.—DELG s.v. ῥέω.

Hippocr Hippocr = Corpus Hippocraticum, V–IV b.c.—List 5

Aristot Aristot , various works, IV b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

IG IG = Inscriptiones Graecae—List 3

someth. someth. = something

Papias Papias , early Christian writer, II a.d.—List 1

NT NT = New Testament

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 309
